title: Mystical Mekanism Reprocessing
description: This mod adds recipes that allow you to convert Mystical Agriculture seeds into essence using Mekanism’s Enrichment Chamber, as a replacement for the Mystical Agriculture Seed Reprocessor.
body:
# Mystical Mekanism Reprocessing

![New Mekanism's Enrichment Chamber recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/drago-suzuki58/Mystical-Mekanism-Reprocessing/main/image.png)

## Overview

This mod adds recipes that allow you to convert Mystical Agriculture seeds into essence using Mekanism's Enrichment Chamber, as a replacement for the Mystical Agriculture Seed Reprocessor.  

KubeJS is not used.

## Required Mods

- Mystical Agriculture
- Mekanism

## How to Use

Just install the mod and you’re good to go.

## Use in Modpacks

Feel free to include it.
